subject: Re: Warp on Linux installation issue
body:
Hi Yunjie,
Problems solving environments typically happen when people install a bunch of things into their base environment. You might also be using the conda solver rather than mamba, conda can be slow. I would recommend nuking your conda installation and starting again with the latest version of mambaforge :-)
Miniforge Releases
conda-forge.org
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Nov 24, 2024, at 21:42, Yunjie Chang <changyj0821@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Hi warp list,
I am trying to install warp on my linux workstation (Ubuntu 22.04, nvidia 4090). Using this command:
conda create -n warp warp -c warpem -c nvidia/label/cuda-11.8.0 -c pytorch -c conda-forge
However, after I hit enter in the terminal, it is just keep "Solving environment". I have waited for hours and nothing changed.
Any idea to solve this issue?
Best
Yunjie
